phase_name: EAASP v2.0 Phase 0.5 — MVP 全层贯通
status: S4 COMPLETE (2/2). SSE streaming endpoint POST /message/stream + CLI stream_sse() + cmd_session --stream default. L4 56 pass / CLI 20 pass. Next: S5 Acceptance.
notes: Phase 0 archived (15/15 PASS @ a955c44). Phase 0.5 S1-S4 complete. G3/G4/D53/D54/D40 CLOSED. G5 (streaming) CLOSED via S4 SSE endpoint + CLI consumer. Next: S5 dev-eaasp one-click + human acceptance.

S1_L4_L1_gRPC.description: Proto Python gen + L1RuntimeClient + session state machine

S2_LLM_Provider.description: Provider config passthrough + grid-runtime agent loop LLM integration
S2_LLM_Provider.tests: 62 Rust (2 ignored LLM live) + 52 L4 (4 new context_assembly) + 54 claude-code-runtime
S2_LLM_Provider.key_finding: LLM 通路已在 Phase 0 连通 (main.rs → ProviderConfig → AgentRuntime). S2 主要是 config passthrough + capabilities 修正 + 测试覆盖.

S3_MCP_Hook_Executor.description: connectMCP + scoped-hook executor + memory write channel
S3_MCP_Hook_Executor.tests: 93 Rust (50 new: 4 unit resolve_mcp + 10 unit scoped_hook + 12 unit l2_client+memory_hook + 4 integration + 2 grpc) + 75 Python (21 new: 11 scoped_hooks + 10 l2_memory) + 52 L4

S4_Streaming.description: L1→L4 streaming response + CLI real-time display
S4_Streaming.tests: L4 56/56 (+4 new: stream_message async gen + SSE endpoint + SSE 404 + stream_unknown) / CLI 20/20 (+2 new: send_stream_default + send_no_stream)
S4_Streaming.key_finding: Proto Send RPC + grid-runtime harness + L1 client already server-streaming. Only needed L4 API SSE layer + CLI SSE consumer.

S5_Acceptance.description: dev-eaasp make target + human acceptance + doc closeout

exit_gate: Human acceptance: eaasp-cli session send → see agent streaming output with tool calls, memory writes, hook triggers, cross-session memory recall
